headline: Disney Receives Upgrade and Is Historically Cheap Even in Harsh Scenarios
summary: Disney (NYSE:DIS) received a notable analyst upgrade on Wednesday as Raymond James shifted its rating to Outperform from Market Perform, setting a $115 price target. The call arrives after Disney stock has fallen 13.06% year-to-date, creating what the firm sees as a historically attractive entry point for long-term investors.
